item_titles: Hugging Face uses open-weights Z.ai GLM 5.2 to battle attacker
OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models
OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
clusters.summary: OpenAI称Hugging Face遭遇的安全事件与其预发布模型测试有关，双方合作应对并分享了网络安全防御经验。
clusters.title: OpenAI与Hugging Face安全事件及模型评估

item_titles: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
Google ships three new Gemini Flash models but its frontier 3.5 Pro remains lost in training
clusters.summary: Google发布了Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite和Flash Cyber三款新模型，大幅提升效率，但旗舰版3.5 Pro仍未发布。
clusters.title: Google发布三款全新Gemini Flash模型

item_titles: Who’s Afraid of Chinese Models?
US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
China’s AI models have Trump’s AI world at war with itself
clusters.summary: 美国威胁就知识产权窃取问题制裁中国开源AI模型，此举在政界引发分歧，也引起了关于AI模型训练与蒸馏合法性的广泛讨论。
clusters.title: 美国考虑制裁中国AI模型及引发的争议

item_titles: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
clusters.summary: OpenAI启动ChatGPT小企业项目，旨在帮助创业者构建AI技能、自动化工作并利用ChatGPT Work实现业务增长。
clusters.title: OpenAI推出面向小企业的ChatGPT计划

item_titles: How to build interactive experiences with canvases

clusters.title: 如何利用画布构建交互式AI体验

item_titles: Cisco releases Antares: open weight AI for vulnerability research

clusters.title: 思科发布Antares开源安全AI模型

item_titles: Imageboards and AI Fairness

clusters.title: AI反弹与抵制情绪加剧

item_titles: White House to Redirect Billions in Research Funds Toward AI, Away from Colleges

clusters.title: 白宫将数十亿研究资金从高校转向AI

item_titles: 15% of long-form Reddit posts are AI-written (41% in R/CryptoCurrency)

item_titles: I trained a 30M-param LLM from scratch and the scaling "floor" was a mirage

item_titles: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app

item_titles: 🔬Causal Models Need Causal Data - Xaira’s X-Cell model for Drug Discovery (Bo Wang & Ci Chu, Chief Discovery Officer & Chief AI Scientist)

clusters.title: Xaira的X-Cell模型：药物发现需要因果数据

item_titles: An AI system helped Pakistani judges clear massive backlogs at $38.50 return per dollar invested
clusters.summary: 实验显示AI助手JudgeGPT提升了案件处理效率，但仅限接受过实操培训的法官受益，投资回报比达1:38.5。
clusters.title: AI系统帮助巴基斯坦法官清理积压案件

item_titles: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035

clusters.title: 数据中心耗电量预计到2035年增长四倍
